name: @atproto/api
version:
0.20.6What changed:
/v1/sessions/start no longer creates a real M8 session when OAuth is required. It now creates only a short-lived OAuth login attempt; sessions/tokens are issued only after a valid OAuth callback.
Production dev-token bootstrap is now guarded by assertProductionFeatureSafety(), so GrowthBook overrides cannot force-enable demo/dev auth paths in production without explicit BREAK_GLASS_DEMO_PATHS=enabled.
Added token issuance enforcement: tokens require an authenticated active session.
Refresh tokens now rotate; reused refresh tokens are rejected and audited.
Added OAuth attempt persistence in oauth_login_attempts.
Added issuer revoked-key handling via IDENTITY_ISSUER_REVOKED_KEY_IDS.
/v1/issuers now exposes current/previous/revoked/expired key status metadata.
Credential issuance ledger entries now include credentialId, issuerDid, and issuerKeyId.
Added npm run keys:generate and issuer-key-operations.md for generation, planned rotation, compromised-key handling, and audit expectations.
Verification:
tsc --noEmit passed.
OpenAPI JSON parse passed.
Full unit suite passed: 25/25.
Full integration suite passed: 41/41.
node ace build passed.
git diff --check passed.
description: Client library for atproto and Bluesky
